ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "development_status" TEXT /* Development status (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "setup_complexity" TEXT /* Setup complexity (e.g., A, B, C, D, E) */,
  "ui_usability" TEXT /* UI usability (e.g., A, B, C, D, E) */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability (e.g., A, B, C, D, E) */,
  "feature_set" TEXT /* Feature set (e.g., A, B, C, D, E) */,
  "power_level" TEXT /* Power level (e.g., A, B, C, D, E) */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* URL to the feature's documentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "assigned_developer" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the feature */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_power_level FOREIGN KEY ("power_level") REFERENCES power_levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_feature_set FOREIGN KEY ("feature_set") REFERENCES feature_sets ("set_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the bug report is related to */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug report (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the bug report (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the bug report */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the bug (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature request */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the request is related to */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the feature request */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the feature request was resolved */,
  "business_value" TEXT /* Business value of the feature request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feature (1-5) */,
  "use_case" TEXT /* Specific use case the user is providing feedback on */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the feedback was provided (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature set */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature set is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the power level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the power level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the power level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the power level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the power level is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_levels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
